Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
Witness: Duk Soon Lee sworn and examined.

Plaintiff's Exhibit:
1-Grant Deed Dated 5/31/2012 (2 page)
2-Grant Deed Dated 3/11/2013 (2 page)
3-First American Title Report (16 pages)
4-Deed of Trust (22 pages)
5-Deed of Trust (8 pages)
Court returns all exhibits to plaintiff's counsel.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff, Duk Soon
Lee and against Defaulted Defendants Tae Seung Kwon, Moon Sung Kim, Soo Hyon Na, Pil Seung
Rhee, Hyon Sook Jeon, Kyeong Whan Hong, Tae Son, Sae Yeon Shin, Nam Jik Cho, Myung Sik
Chung, Hye Y. Yoon, Yeon Su Kim, and Pyung H. Bae canceling Grant Deeds recorded on June 1, 2012 and March 12, 2013, and transferring Plaintiff Duk Soon Lee's interest in 2339 37th Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94116.
